rows.finalText: One workable lens for "What is the next right step in my calling" is Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Heart (24), putting the need to choose what aligns with your core values in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Heart often points to what still feels genuinely meaningful, and the part of the path that remains emotionally true in your calling. Present turns on Stork (17), bringing change is active and potentially beneficial to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Stork often points to improvement, transition, upgrades, and the feeling that something is trying to move into a better form in your calling. What develops in Future through Counterpart (28) points to consider how the other party experiences this, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Counterpart colors your calling through the other person's position, their motives, and the part of the story you do not control directly. Heart (24) with Counterpart (28) show what most shapes the question of calling: emotional resonance with the other person. The spread turns on Stork (17) more than any other card. Stork often points to improvement, transition, upgrades, and the feeling that something is trying to move into a better form in your calling. Heart (24) with Counterpart (28) keep emphasizing emotional resonance with the other person. Sequence improvements deliberately so Counterpart (28) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
